do: Run the wall — tag the waypoint on the way through
Enter The Sarn Encampment at the far gate
steps.layout: Linear rampart — one path along the wall.

do: Quick NPC round: Sin + Hargan (Essence of the Hag), Clarissa (Love is Dead), Maramoa (The Gemling Legion)
Enter The Toxic Conduits through the sewer entrance
Find the passage down into Doedre's Cesspool (no waypoint here — it's after the boss)
Push to The Cauldron and turn the valve to start the fight
Kill Doedre the Vile — turn the valve mid-fight to clear her vortexes and summons
Tag the waypoint after the Cauldron fight
Take the NORTH branch of the T-junction to The Quay (the south branch leads to The Grand Promenade — if you end up there, backtrack into the Cesspool)
steps.tip: Chaos DoT everywhere — keep moving, don't stand in the vortexes.

do: Grab the ANKH OF ETERNITY from the shrine near the entrance
Find the Resurrection Site → give Clarissa the Ankh → kill the zombie waves, then risen Tolman
Exit to The Grain Gate
steps.layout: Ankh is close to the zone entrance (look for the long bridge); the Resurrection Site is deeper along the waterfront.
steps.tip: Worth the sweep: +1 passive + 2 respec points on turn-in.

do: Kill the Gemling Legionnaires as you cross (+1 passive on turn-in)
Tag the waypoint
Exit up to The Imperial Fields
Tag the waypoint
Cross the fields and enter The Solaris Temple Level 1
Tag the waypoint
Climb to The Solaris Temple Level 2
Kill Dawn, Harbinger of Solaris — heavy FIRE, don't stand in the solar beam
Take the SUN ORB
LOGOUT to town
steps.tip: Logout warp — instant free travel, fully allowed.

do: Turn in: Essence of the Hag (Hargan), Love is Dead (Clarissa — +1 passive, +2 respec), The Gemling Legion (Maramoa — +1 passive)
Buy/refresh gems per your build sheet
Waypoint → The Solaris Temple Level 1, take the exit out to The Solaris Concourse
Tag the waypoint
Take the exit onto The Harbour Bridge
Run straight across, past the Sky Shrine altars mid-bridge (you'll return with both orbs)
Exit to The Lunaris Concourse
steps.tip: Level 60 zone — don't fight, just run.

do: Tag the waypoint
Take the exit up to The Bath House
Tag the waypoint
DO the Trial of Ascendancy — first of three for Merciless Lab
Kill Hector Titucius, Eternal Servant → grab the WINGS OF VASTIRI (jewel from Hargan on turn-in)
IF you spot The Hidden Underbelly (secret side area): optional loot detour only — skip when racing
Exit to The High Gardens
Push to the Pools of Terror at the far end — kill Yugul, Reflection of Terror (+1 passive on turn-in)
Walk back through The Bath House, drop down to The Lunaris Concourse, enter The Lunaris Temple Level 1
steps.tip: Don't logout here — the walk back is just as fast and keeps the guide in sync.

do: Tag the waypoint
Descend to The Lunaris Temple Level 2
Kill Dusk, Harbinger of Lunaris — stay off the dark vortex circles the moon orb drops
Take the MOON ORB
LOGOUT to town
Turn in The Wings of Vastiri to Hargan (rare jewel choice); talk to Sin for Reflection of Terror (+1 passive)
Waypoint → The Lunaris Concourse, run back onto The Harbour Bridge
Place the Sun and Moon Orbs at the Sky Shrine altars to summon the goddesses
Kill Solaris and Lunaris — phases alternate FIRE (Solaris) and COLD (Lunaris) before a joint finale
Take the passage that opens in the Sky Shrine → Act 9 (The Blood Aqueduct)
steps.tip: Cap fire + cold res before the fight. Target: ~level 58–60 leaving Act 8.
